ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicle_registration" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle registration */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the registration statistics */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle category */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle make */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle model */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was registered */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle owner */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "engine_capacity" INTEGER /* Engine capacity of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Fuel type of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle category (e.g., heavy, medium, light) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for which vehicle registration statistics are recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, regulator, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the report is generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trend analysis, compliance) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_make" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle make */,
  "make_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle make */,
  "origin_country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the vehicle make */,
  "make_description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle make */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the make of the vehicle */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category to which the vehicle model belongs */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_models_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES vehicle_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_models_make_id FOREIGN KEY ("make_id") REFERENCES vehicle_make ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registration_details" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle registration */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the registration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle model */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was registered */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle owner */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "engine_capacity" INTEGER /* Engine capacity of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Fuel type of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registration_details_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registration_details_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the compliance standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance standard */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance standard became effective */,
  "standard_type" TEXT /* Type of the compliance standard (e.g., emission, safety) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle compliance record */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle registration */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compliance standard */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was inspected for compliance */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_compliance_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registration_details ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_compliance_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES compliance_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail record */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle registration */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registration_details ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new registration, compliance issue) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
